speaker: speaker1
text: Hi , I'm George . I'll be your waiter this evening . Are you ready to order or do you need a few more minutes ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I'm ready now . I'd like the roast chicken and a side order of corn .

speaker: speaker1
text: And would you like an appetizer before your meal ? The soup of the day is our delicious tomato soup .

speaker: speaker2
text: I'll pass on the soup , but I'd like a garden salad .

speaker: speaker1
text: Can I get you anything to drink ? :

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , I'd like a glass of iced tea .

speaker: speaker1
text: Okay . I'll be back in a minute with your drink and salad .
